mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_reply(thread_id, post_id, user_id, reply_to_user_id, content, status, created_at) VALUES(#{threadId}, #{postId}, #{userId}, #{replyToUserId}, #{content}, 1, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u1.nickname as authorName, u1.avatar_path as authorAvatar, u2.nickname as replyToUserName FROM forum_reply r LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u1 ON r.user_id = u1.user_id LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u2 ON r.reply_to_user_id = u2.user_id WHERE r.post_id = #{postId} AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.created_at ASC
